summary: Full e2e testing of ListWorks PRO. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed in 77s — all 5 tones (Luxury/Cozy/Modern/Family/Investor) on POST /api/rewrite return valid JSON with mls/instagram/facebook/headlines[]/email; validation rejects <10 char listings (400); /api/examples returns the 3 example objects with all required fields; /api/listings/{session_id} persists & returns rows with no _id leakage; /api/feedback returns {ok:true}; /api/analyze-photo successfully analyzed a real Unsplash JPEG (resized & re-encoded JPEG, base64) and returned features/style/suggested_headline. Frontend: landing page loads on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with all 11 critical sections visible (header, hero, marquee, playground, examples, features, guide upsell, testimonials, pricing, FAQ, footer). FAQ accordion clicks, before/after example tabs switch, tone pills toggle (Luxury active class), sample-btn fills 215-char sample, generate-btn triggers AI rewrite, all 5 output tabs (MLS/Instagram/Facebook/Headlines/Email) populate with substantive AI text (494-840 chars each).

ui_bugs.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText() is called without try/catch or .catch(); when the browser denies clipboard permission (sandboxed/iframe contexts, http) it surfaces an Uncaught NotAllowedError that triggers React's runtime error overlay in dev. Production won't show the overlay but the success toast still fires misleadingly. Wrap in try/catch and show error toast on failure, or use document.execCommand fallback.

action_items: (LOW) Add try/catch (or .catch()) around navigator.clipboard.writeText in /app/frontend/src/components/Playground.jsx copyText() so denied-clipboard errors don't bubble up as Uncaught runtime errors. Optionally fall back to a hidden textarea + document.execCommand('copy').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: tone validation is silent — unknown tone falls back to Modern guide but req.tone is echoed back as-is. Consider Pydantic Literal['Luxury','Cozy','Modern','Family','Investor'] to reject invalid tones with 422.
server.py: /api/feedback has no email format validation. Use EmailStr from pydantic.
server.py: /api/analyze-photo accepts mime_type but never validates it (must be one of jpeg/png/webp per /app/image_testing.md).
server.py: in-memory cleanup absent — TEST_ session listings persist in mongo. Consider an admin/cleanup endpoint or TTL index.
Playground copyText: missing async/await + error handling on Clipboard API.
seed_data_creation: Created session_id prefixed with TEST_ in mongo via /api/rewrite. ~5 listings + 1 feedback row inserted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints fully verified via pytest /app/backend/tests/test_listworks.py (uses real Unsplash JPEG re-encoded for /api/analyze-photo). Frontend playground end-to-end works incl. Luxury tone generate flow. Only nit: clipboard writeText not wrapped in try/catch — surfaces dev overlay in sandboxed browsers. data-testid coverage is complete and matches problem statement.
